scripts.build:hosting: env CI=1 VITE_HOSTING_BUILD=1 VITE_MAX_PARALLEL_FILE_OPS=1 UV_THREADPOOL_SIZE=1 GOMEMLIMIT=384MiB NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=384 npx --no-install vite build
scripts.build:hosting:ram: env CI=1 VITE_HOSTING_BUILD=1 VITE_MAX_PARALLEL_FILE_OPS=1 UV_THREADPOOL_SIZE=1 GOMEMLIMIT=512MiB NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=512 npx --no-install vite build
scripts.build:hosting:micro: env CI=1 VITE_HOSTING_BUILD=1 VITE_MAX_PARALLEL_FILE_OPS=1 UV_THREADPOOL_SIZE=1 GOMEMLIMIT=256MiB NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=256 npx --no-install vite build
